Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Thank you for always helping me... But I gotta say bye for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Remember not to tell Mom and Dad, okay? Bye-bye![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Have you seen a little girl? She's in elementary school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Will you just take a second and calm down?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Calm down!? What if something happens to her!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Oh please! This is what happens when you force a child to study non-stop![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Why are you always like this!? Everything has to be MY fault![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}That's because it IS your fault! This never would have happened if you'd been watching her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Look, we don't have time for this![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}I think I know who you are. {f 4 1}-kun, right? Maiko's told me about you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}She said she played with a high school kid instead of practicing piano.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}What!? This is the first I'm hearing of this![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}What the hell did you do to my daughter!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The woman is extremely agitated...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Shut up! Stop jumping to stupid conclusions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}I'm sorry about this... We're Maiko's parents.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}We haven't seen her since this morning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}When we checked her room, we found a note that said, "I'm running away."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}She's never done anything like this before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}R-Right. She might be around here somewhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Excuse me!? You don't know anything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Don't be stupid! What if something happens to her out there!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}If you have any idea where she is, I'm begging you to tell us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}The music store...? Why would she have gone there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Takoyaki stand? Oh, that place![n]{f 1 1}
